activities.instructions: Choose the correct present perfect passive form.
activities.prompt: The timetable ___ updated.
activities.explanation: El sujeto singular usa «has been updated».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct present perfect passive form.
activities.prompt: All the windows ___ replaced.
activities.explanation: El sujeto plural usa «have been replaced».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct modal passive form.
activities.prompt: The map can ___ from the visitor centre.
activities.explanation: Después de «can» usamos «be + participio».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct modal passive form.
activities.prompt: Protective gloves must ___ in the workshop.
activities.explanation: La obligación pasiva usa «must be worn».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct recommendation in the passive.
activities.prompt: The final paragraph should ___ shorter.
activities.explanation: Después de «should» usamos «be made».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct negative perfect passive.
activities.prompt: The source of the leak ___ identified yet.
activities.explanation: El sujeto singular usa «hasn't been identified».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct perfect passive question.
activities.prompt: ___ the replacement keys been sent?
activities.explanation: El sujeto plural requiere «Have ... been sent?».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct irregular participle.
activities.prompt: The winning entry has been ___ by the judges.
activities.explanation: El participio de «choose» es «chosen».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct negative modal passive.
activities.prompt: The emergency exit mustn't ___ by boxes.
activities.explanation: La prohibición pasiva usa «mustn't be blocked».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct modal passive question.
activities.prompt: Can the booking ___ to another date?
activities.explanation: La pregunta sigue «Can + sujeto + be + participio?».

activities.instructions: Choose the natural position of “already”.
activities.prompt: The invoices ___.
activities.explanation: El plural usa «have» y «already» aparece naturalmente antes de «been».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct tense for the stated time.
activities.prompt: The result ___ yesterday afternoon.
activities.explanation: «Yesterday afternoon» es un tiempo pasado terminado y usa pasado simple.

activities.instructions: Choose the tense that emphasises the current result.
activities.prompt: The footbridge ___ because of ice, so use the road crossing.
activities.explanation: La consecuencia actual favorece «has been closed».

activities.instructions: Choose the passive form expressing possibility.
activities.prompt: The outdoor concert ___ if the wind becomes stronger.
activities.explanation: La posibilidad pasiva usa «may be cancelled».

activities.instructions: Choose the passive form expressing no necessity.
activities.prompt: The form ___; a digital copy is sufficient.
activities.explanation: La copia digital elimina la necesidad, pero no prohíbe imprimir.

activities.instructions: Choose the passive sentence that preserves the active meaning.
activities.prompt: Active: “The review panel has approved both proposals.”

options.text: Both proposals have been approved by the review panel.
Both proposals has been approved by the review panel.
Both proposals have be approved by the review panel.
The review panel has been approved by both proposals.

activities.explanation: El nuevo sujeto plural usa «have been approved».

activities.instructions: Choose the passive sentence that preserves the active meaning.
activities.prompt: Active: “Visitors can download the audio guide free of charge.”

options.text: The audio guide can be downloaded free of charge.
The audio guide can been downloaded free of charge.
Visitors can be downloaded by the audio guide.
The audio guide can be download free of charge.

activities.explanation: El modal se conserva y se añade «be downloaded».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct perfect passive question.
activities.prompt: How many new trees ___ in the park this year?
activities.explanation: El plural pregunta por resultados hasta ahora: «have been planted».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct modal passive question order.
activities.prompt: ___ before publication?

options.text: Do the figures should be checked

activities.explanation: La pregunta coloca el sujeto entre «should» y «be».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct contrast between prohibition and no necessity.
activities.prompt: Original photographs ___, but reference copies ___.

options.text: mustn't be removed / don't have to be returned
don't have to be removed / mustn't be returned
mustn't been removed / don't have to returned
must not removed / haven't to be returned

activities.explanation: La primera acción está prohibida; devolver las copias no es necesario.

activities.instructions: Choose the sequence that correctly distinguishes completed past time from current result.
activities.prompt: The old permit ___ in 2024, but a new one ___ now.

options.text: has been cancelled / was issued now

activities.explanation: La fecha terminada usa pasado simple; el resultado actual usa present perfect passive.

activities.instructions: Choose the only completion with correct adverb position and participle.
activities.prompt: Several accessibility improvements ___ to the revised design.
activities.explanation: El plural usa «have», seguido naturalmente por «recently been added».

activities.instructions: Choose the passive form that states a possible future decision, not a past possibility.
activities.prompt: Depending on demand, an extra workshop ___ next month.
activities.explanation: La posibilidad futura B1 usa «might be offered».

activities.instructions: Choose the correct double passive sequence.
activities.prompt: The faulty units ___, and all affected customers ___ automatically.

options.text: have been recalled / have been contacted
has been recalled / has been contacted
have been recall / have be contacted

activities.explanation: Ambos sujetos son plurales y requieren «have been + participio».

activities.instructions: Choose the sentence that correctly combines a present result and a recommendation.
activities.prompt: Which sentence is fully correct?

options.text: The draft has been revised, but the references should be checked again.
The draft has be revised, but the references should been checked again.
The draft have been revised, but the references should be check again.
The draft has revised, but the references should checked again.

activities.explanation: La frase combina «has been revised» con «should be checked».
